promotion_decision.reviewed_by_or_process: WP20 deterministic regime engine promotion-review contract

blockers: client-safe deterministic regime report surface not designed in this package
production report integration not authorized in this package
raw macro_axes and macro_axis_scores remain blocked from client reports

review_summary.decision: Do not promote deterministic regime engine to production report narrative authority in WP20.
review_summary.reason: Fixture and shadow validation evidence are green, but promotion gates for methodology, bilingual parity, client-surface compliance, and explicit control-layer promotion are not complete.
review_summary.allowed_next_step: Design a client-safe deterministic regime report surface in a later output-contract package if desired.
review_summary.disallowed_next_step: Do not wire raw deterministic_regime_shadow, macro_axes, macro_axis_scores, or macro_evidence directly into English/Dutch client reports.
